blended.narrative: Loon Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 9,033 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 55°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
